channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Trump blasts ‘hostile’ Fed and says Warsh ‘has to do what he has to do’ on interest rates
item.description: <![CDATA[Trump blasts ‘hostile’ Fed and says Warsh ‘has to do what he has to do’ on interest rates]]>
